summary: First iteration full-stack testing for Radio Latina FM. 24/24 backend pytest tests pass. Frontend critical flows verified end-to-end: home + sticky player, advertiser grid, advertiser detail navigation, language toggle ES/EN, admin login with JWT, activate/AUTO/none flows, SmartCTA appearance after activation, station settings save, new advertiser creation via form. No blocking issues. One minor React console warning about empty img src.

issues: Floating SmartCTA panel covers the bottom of the login form when an advertiser is active; submit button is still reachable via scroll/force click but visually crowded. Consider hiding SmartCTA on /login and /admin or auto-collapsing when keyboard/forms are focused.

React warning: 'An empty string was passed to the src attribute' originates from when banner_path is empty. The wrapper guards on form.banner_path but the warning still appeared during transitions. Either render only when bannerUrl(...) returns a truthy value, or fall back to a placeholder.

action_items: (Optional) Hide SmartCTA on /login and /admin routes for less visual clutter on mobile.
(Optional) Avoid passing empty string to in AdminAdvertiserForm banner preview to silence React DOM warning.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is single-file (~497 lines) but still readable; consider modularising auth, storage, and admin routes into separate modules if it grows past ~700 lines.
Object storage init runs synchronously at startup with `requests` (blocking). Acceptable for now; long-term consider httpx.AsyncClient for non-blocking init/upload.

CORS uses allow_credentials=True with allow_origins read from env (good). Default fallback '*' would conflict with credentials — current .env sets explicit origins so it's fine, but consider failing fast if CORS_ORIGINS is missing instead of defaulting to '*'.
Password verification swallows all exceptions silently in verify_password; OK for malformed hashes but log at debug level for diagnostics.
No brute-force lockout / rate limiting on /api/auth/login (the playbook mentions 5-fail lockout). Not strictly required by problem statement but flagged for security hardening.
Frontend uses axios baseURL that will be `${undefined}/api` if REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL is missing; consider asserting at module load.
seed_data_creation: All TEST_ prefixed advertisers and settings mutations were rolled back. Active advertiser restored to AUTO. station_name/station_tagline restored to defaults.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_radio_api.py and use BASE_URL=REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. They cover public endpoints, JWT auth (cookie + Bearer), admin CRUD, activate flow (specific id, AUTO, none), schedule resolver, and image upload via Emergent Object Store. All 24 pass. Frontend was tested with Playwright on both desktop (1280x900) and mobile (390x844). AdvertiserForm input data-testids are placed on the <input> itself (e.g., form-name, form-whatsapp), not the wrapper. Slugify produces dashes (TEST_FE_Adv -> test-fe-adv).
